Manifiesto.Title: Welcome Kyler
Manifiesto.Subtitle: Discover our philosophy and core values
Manifiesto.Footer: THE SKY IS NOT THE LIMIT
Manifiesto.StepsDescription1: Our business philosophy is built on the WIN-WIN concept: Creating value for everyone. This means that in every interaction, we, our users, partners, and collaborators all gain real benefits. We don't seek to win at others' expense, but to generate solutions where all parties thrive.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription2: Kylot was born to transform the world, offering people, businesses, and institutions the opportunity to reach their best version regardless of their money or status. Here, the value you objectively contribute in your daily life and to the community is what truly matters.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription3: We believe in competition as a tool for improvement, not for fighting. We trust in feedback as an instrument for a better system.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription4: We love being connected, which is why at the core of our application beats a social network that unites our community from every corner of the planet.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription5: We design, implement, and improve every feature of our system thinking about people's real needs. Our users aren't just customers—they're the reason our application exists and the driving force behind every decision we make.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription6: We quantify the daily lives of people, businesses, and institutions, creating a custom system that provides differential value. We're not just an app—we're a system designed to improve your life and reward the effort and actions that truly add value.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription7: Money doesn't drive us—we are truthful, quality-focused, and intuitive. We love well-executed actions and adding value. With these principles, you'll reach the highest level of our system where you can enjoy life to the fullest.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription8: We want to build one big family under the WIN-WIN motto, maintaining integrity, transparency, and honesty as our guiding principles.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription9: At Kylot, we support our users' creativity. All features they propose that get implemented will generate direct benefits for them. We believe that those who add value should also receive it.
Manifiesto.StepsDescription10: Our ultimate goal... to create the world's largest Foundation dedicated to providing quality, up-to-date, and essential services to children and adolescents with educational and psychological needs. Therefore, we want to become the planet's largest and most contributory CSR social network.

Tutorial.TitleTutorial: Master Kylot: Unlock Every Hidden Feature
Tutorial.Footer: THE SKY IS NOT THE LIMIT

Tutorial.title: WORLD GLOBE
description: Your world, your legacy: Kylot World is your personal atlas: conquered countries, created places, surprises to discover. Your travel story is written here, in real time.

Tutorial.title: THE MAP'S SECRET
description: Participate in the community to discover experiences, moments and secret locations on the map. Your counter will change from blue to gold, and you'll have 24 hours to explore before new mysteries appear.

Tutorial.title: MAP PIN COLORS
description: Each color tells a story
White: Country unlocked.
Black: Experience locked.
Gold: Experience unlocked.
Blue: Experience locked but of your interest.

Tutorial.title: RANKING
description: Compete and stand out: Rise in the local and global ranking by participating in the community. Every action counts: from sharing locations to helping other travelers. Will you reach the top of your city?

Tutorial.title: BANK
description: Share the wealth: Access your Kylot Bank by tapping the crown and send Kylets to friends or members who have helped you.

Tutorial.title: UNLOCK FUNCTIONS
description: Win-Win: To unlock locations created by other users you must use the Kylets you've earned by generating value in the community

Tutorial.title: KYLETS SYSTEM
description: Earn by helping others: Kylets are obtained by being useful: share incredible locations, create inspiring lists, contribute unique tricks, answer questions... The more you help, the more you earn.

Tutorial.title: LISTS
description: Organize your dreams: Create personalized lists in WALLET, add discoveries from other travelers by tapping the plus on their locations and decide whether to share them with the community or keep them as your secret treasure.

Tutorial.title: EXPERIENCES
description: Your adventure diary: Document each experience with location, categories, dates and photos. Relive your best moments, share them with other travelers and earn Kylets for inspiring.

Tutorial.title: ROUTES
description: Trace your path: Visualize your complete itineraries with each detailed stop. Tap any location to relive your journey and share the perfect path with other adventurers.

Tutorial.title: STEP BY STEP
description: Guide other travelers: Add detailed instructions in your itineraries so other members can easily reach those special places you discovered. Within the itinerary, users add this section with the goal of facilitating access to locations for other members

Tutorial.title: CONTACTS
description: Discover contacts recommended by other members: from local professionals to experts in different areas. Your trust network grows with each connection.

Tutorial.title: NOTES
description: Save ideas, reflections and discoveries instantly in your itinerary. Your notes sync with specific places and moments, creating your intelligent personal diary and helping other users take them into consideration.

Tutorial.title: REMINDERS
description: Schedule reminders associated with each experience to enjoy them to the fullest, remember they are completely private.

Tutorial.title: ALBUM
description: Create albums of experiences that you have to fulfill 100%. Make your memories come alive and keep the best ones organized.

Tutorial.title: TRICKS
description: The best kept secrets: Do you know a shortcut to get what you need, a trick to save time or a more efficient method? Share your life hacks by categories and help the community live smarter.

Tutorial.title: TIPS
description: Tips worth gold: Forget searching through a thousand websites. Here you'll find practical advice from real people, organized by categories, to solve any need in your daily life.

Tutorial.title: CONTACTS
description: Your trust network: Discover contacts recommended by other community members: from local professionals to experts in different areas. Your trust network awaits you.

Tutorial.title: GROUPS
description: Create your groups or connect with local groups from the community recommended by other members: from professionals to enthusiasts who share your interests. Discover communities that will transform your way of connecting.

Tutorial.title: ACTIVITIES
description: Create activities or participate in others created by other community members where you can discover new experiences and wonderful people.

Tutorial.title: QUESTIONS
description: Share your story: Every day you'll receive a unique question on your profile. Answer and earn Kylets, while other members can get to know you better by investing their Kylets to read your answers.

Tutorial.title: KYLOT SECTIONS
description: Don't get too comfortable, they will change very quickly, and others are secret
Map: Main discovery and interaction point for users: create moments, see what your friends do...
Wallet: Space to save all memories, experiences, recommendations both your own and from users...
Community: Meeting point between activities, groups, users and information created by users.
Secret
Profile: Space where all user information resides.
Bank: Accessible through the crown in the upper right corner
WELCOME TO YOUR COMMUNITY
